title: Sienar Mobile Command Post
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Sienar Mobile Command Post''' was a design of [[Space station/Legends|space station]] designed and built by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] for use as habitation around [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]]. They could be up to ten stories tall, with a [[Hangar/Legends|landing bay]] large enough to accommodate four [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]]. [[The Home]]'s mine had a structure similar to an early Sienar Mobile Command Post.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''
